memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Sullivan_Family_Sheet
memoryArtifacts.description:
This family sheet was found in papers of Mildred Evelyn Sullivan LNKH-8PV a granddaugher of Delos.

It was created by her brother Orville Oscar  Sullivan L6L2-JJB who had done a great deal of searching for ancestors. 

Many of the children of Delos appear to have had children.  None were entered at this time (7 July 2020) as I do not know their status

Nte that for Fay William the birth is Sept 21 not 2

zh.lifeSummary: 當William M Sullivan於1839年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親Joshua Parker Sullivan25歲，母親Sarah Ann Wisman27歲。他於1861年2月13日與Mary Louisa Vinton在美國密西根州貝里恩貝里恩 堂史普結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1895年住在美國愛阿華州法也特且於1900年住在美國愛阿華州法也特埃爾金。他去世於1907年11月6日在美國愛阿華州法也特藍達利亞享年68歲，埋葬在美國愛阿華州法也特普利桑特 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William M Sullivan于1839年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲Joshua Parker Sullivan25岁，母亲Sarah Ann Wisman27岁。他于1861年2月13日与Mary Louisa Vinton在美国密歇根州貝里恩貝里恩 堂史普结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1895年住在美国艾奥瓦州法也特且于1900年住在美国艾奥瓦州法也特埃爾金。他去世于1907年11月6日在美国艾奥瓦州法也特藍達利亞享年68岁，埋葬在美国艾奥瓦州法也特普利桑特 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: The Night of the BIG WIND. In Killarney and its neighborhood there was a terrible hurricane. The town sustained much damage and many houses were shattered.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.
Historical Boundaries: 1873: Fayette, Iowa, United States

historicEvents.title: A Treaty with Hawaii
historicEvents.description: In the Mid 1870s, The United States sought out the Kingdom of Hawaii to make a free trade agreement. The Treaty gave the Hawaiians access to the United States agricultural markets and it gave the United States a part of land which later became Pearl Harbor.

historicEvents.title: The First Workers Strike
historicEvents.description: The country was in great economic distress in mid-1877, which caused many workers of the Railroad to come together and began the first national strike in the United States. Crowds gathered in Chicago in extreme number to be a part of the strike which was later named the Great Railroad Strike. Shortly after the strike began, the battle was fought between the authorities and many of the strikers. The conflict escalated to violence and quickly each side turned bloody.

historicEvents.title: The Chicago Canal
historicEvents.description: The Chicago River Canal was built as a sewage treatment scheme to help the city's drinking water not to get contaminated. While the Canal was being constructed the Chicago River's flow was reversed so it could be treated before draining back out into Lake Michigan.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

en.lifeSummary: When William M Sullivan was born in 1839, in Ireland, his father, Joshua Parker Sullivan, was 25 and his mother, Sarah Ann Wisman, was 27. He married Mary Louisa Vinton on 13 February 1861, in Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Fayette, Iowa, United States in 1895 and Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, United States in 1900. He died on 6 November 1907, in Randalia, Fayette, Iowa, United States, at the age of 68, and was buried in Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William M Sullivan est né en 1839, à Irlande, son père, Joshua Parker Sullivan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sarah Ann Wisman, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Louisa Vinton le 13 février 1861, à Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis en 1895 et à Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis en 1900. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1907, à Randalia, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William M Sullivan 1839 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joshua Parker Sullivan 25 und seine Mutter Sarah Ann Wisman 27. Er hat am 13. Februar 1861 in Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Louisa Vinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1895 hat er in Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und 1900 in Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 6. November 1907 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Randalia, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William M Sullivan è nato il nel 1839 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, Joshua Parker Sullivan, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Ann Wisman, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary Louisa Vinton il 13 febbraio 1861, nel Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1895 e nel Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1900. Morì il 6 novembre 1907, nel Randalia, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William M Sullivanが1839年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父Joshua Parker Sullivanは25歳，母Sarah Ann Wismanは27歳であった。1861年2月13日にアメリカ合衆国ミシガン州バーリーンバーリーン トウンシュイップでMary Louisa Vintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1895年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットに，1900年にはアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットエルジンに住んでいた。彼は1907年11月6日にアメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットランダリアで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アイオワ州ファイエットプレアサント グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Pleasant Valley, Fayette, Iowa: 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 플리산트 발리 타운시프
ko.Na Au Say, Kendall, Illinois, United Sta: 미국 일리노이 주 켄달 나-오-지 타운시프
ko.Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa,: 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 플리산트 그로브 세멧리
ko.Berrien, Michigan: 미국 미시간 주 베리 베리 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: William M Sullivan(이)가 1839년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joshua Parker Sullivan(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Ann Wisman(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1861년 2월 13일 미국 미시간 주 베리 베리 타운시프에서 Mary Louisa Vinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1895년도에 미국 아이오와 주 파예트에서, 1900년도에 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 엘긴에서 살았다. 그는 1907년 11월 6일 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 랜다리야에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아이오와 주 파예트 플리산트 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William M Sullivan nasceu em 1839, em Irlanda, seu pai, Joshua Parker Sullivan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Ann Wisman, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Louisa Vinton em 13 de fevereiro de 1861, em Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1895 e em Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América em 1900. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1907, em Randalia, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William M Sullivan родился в 1839 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени Joshua Parker Sullivan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Ann Wisman, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Louisa Vinton 13 февраля 1861 г. в местности бирриен тоуншип, бирриен, Мичиган, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1895 году и в местности элгин, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году. Он умер 6 ноября 1907 г. в местности рандаля, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности плисант гров кеметири, феиетт, Айова, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William M Sullivan nació en 1839, en Irlanda, su papá, Joshua Parker Sullivan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Sarah Ann Wisman, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary Louisa Vinton el 13 de febrero de 1861, en Berrien Township, Berrien, Michigan, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1895 y en Elgin, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos en 1900. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1907, en Randalia, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Fayette, Iowa, Estados Unidos.
